title: senecio rugelia
intro: Senecio rugelia, also known as Groundsel, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic. The health benefits of Groundsel include reducing respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing digestive problems and promoting wound healing. Groundsel can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments, although it's essential to consult with a medical professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
